test.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('/Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension')
checks = []
mission_worker = (root/'agents/mission-worker.md').read_text()
code_quality = (root/'agents/code-quality-worker.md').read_text()
orchestrator = (root/'skills/mission-orchestrator/SKILL.md').read_text()
mission_run = (root/'commands/mission-run.toml').read_text()
checks.append(('mission-worker severity taxonomy', all(token in mission_worker for token in ['`high`', '`medium`', '`low`'])))
checks.append(('code-quality severity taxonomy', all(token in code_quality for token in ['`high`', '`medium`', '`low`'])))
checks.append(('orchestrator option A high severity routing', '### Option A: Follow-Up Feature for High-Severity Issues' in orchestrator))
checks.append(('orchestrator option D medium/low routing', '### Option D: Misc Milestone for Medium/Low Issues' in orchestrator))
checks.append(('mission-run enforces orchestrator_turn only', 'this is the only valid starting state for /mission-run' in mission_run))
checks.append(('mission-run rejects worker_running and handoff_review', 'If the state is "worker_running" or "handoff_review": display error:' in mission_run))
for name, ok in checks:
    print(f'{name}: {"PASS" if ok else "FAIL"}')
if not all(ok for _, ok in checks):
    raise SystemExit(1)
print('ALL_WORKER_DISPATCH_STRUCTURAL_ASSERTIONS_PASSED')
PY

typecheck.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re, tomllib
root = Path('/Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension')
valid_tools = {'read_file','write_file','replace','run_shell_command','grep_search','list_directory','google_web_search','web_fetch','glob','read_many_files'}
for path in [root/'agents/mission-worker.md', root/'agents/code-quality-worker.md']:
    text = path.read_text()
    _, frontmatter, _ = text.split('---\n', 2)
    kind = re.search(r'^kind:\s*(.+)$', frontmatter, re.M)
    tools = re.findall(r'^\s*-\s*([a-z_]+)\s*$', frontmatter, re.M)
    if not kind or kind.group(1).strip() != 'local':
        raise SystemExit(f'{path.name}: invalid kind')
    invalid = [t for t in tools if t not in valid_tools]
    if invalid:
        raise SystemExit(f'{path.name}: invalid tools {invalid}')
    print(f'{path.name}: kind=local tools_ok={len(tools)}')
for cmd in ['mission-run.toml', 'mission-pause.toml', 'mission-resume.toml']:
    tomllib.load(open(root/'commands'/cmd, 'rb'))
    print(f'{cmd}: TOML_OK')
print('AGENT_AND_COMMAND_SCHEMA_VALIDATION_PASSED')
PY

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how mission feature skillName values should map to actually installed worker skills, and tell workers where project-local skills live before they conclude a named skill is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for fix-worker-dispatch-scrutiny still found a mismatch: mission features reference skillName 'extension-builder', the repo contains .factory/skills/extension-builder/SKILL.md, but the worker transcript for session 8485db1d-6e68-4c1d-a3a3-cbfcbc051da3 reports 'Skill not found'.

rejectedObservations.observation: Prior severity-taxonomy inconsistency between worker handoffs, orchestrator routing, and GEMINI.md
rejectedObservations.reason: resolved in round 2 by standardizing on high/medium/low across the reviewed worker-dispatch files
